name: Fête
tagline: Hawaii's first James Beard Best Chef winner in 19 years — seasonal New American meets local soul food in a Chinatown bistro.
mustOrder: twice-fried chicken with grits and collard greens
parking: Street parking on Smith/Bethel; paid lots on Maunakea St
talkStory: Opened 2016 by Chef Robynne Maii — first Native Hawaiian woman to win a James Beard Award (Best Chef Northwest & Pacific, 2022). The menu bridges Southern comfort, French technique, and Hawaiian ingredients. Mon–Sat 11am–10pm. Ask for a seat near the open kitchen. Great combined with a Chinatown walk — galleries, Maunakea Marketplace, Local Joe coffee all nearby.
